aboutUs.heroSubtitle: We turn LLMs and multimodal AI into reliable products and services. We give businesses and developers stable, easy-to-use AI capabilities and tools.
aboutUs.heroMission: Empowering every organization with AI, and every idea with better execution.

companyIntro.title: Who We Are
companyIntro.subtitle: Delivering AI capabilities into every application and every collaboration, through technology and product.
companyIntro.paragraph1: ZhiHui AI focuses on productizing and scaling AI. We connect leading LLMs and multimodal providers and expose them through unified APIs, workflows, and an open platform—so teams can adopt and iterate on AI faster and at lower cost.
companyIntro.paragraph2: Our team comes from the frontline of the internet and AI: we combine algorithm and engineering depth with real-world use cases. We believe AI creates value only when it is actually used. So we invest in reliability, usability, and scalability, and offer Ready-to-use solutions for collaboration, content creation, and agents.
